name: stock-scanner
description: A stock scanner tool that identifies stocks based on defined rules.

scripts.prepare:news-qqq-daily: npm run fetch:qqq-tickers && TICKERS_FILE_PATH=data/qqq_tickers.csv npm run fetch:news && cp data/news_sentiment.csv data/news_events_6y.csv && npm run build:news-daily
scripts.prepare:learning-table: npm run fetch:earnings && npm run fetch:macro && npm run prepare:news-qqq-daily && npm run build:event-overlay
scripts.prepare:learning-daily: npm run fetch:earnings && npm run fetch:macro && npm run prepare:news-qqq-daily && npm run build:learning-daily
scripts.prepare:event-data: npm run fetch:earnings && npm run fetch:macro && npm run fetch:news && npm run build:event-overlay

author: Your Name
